resources:
ATIONET REVOPOS Compact Present your identification Terminal Management ATIONET Modules Tickets and site Other Controller Language Details Local Agent OK! Next Save and exit Exit Looks good! Next Correct! Next Perfect! Next Great! Next Print settings! Enable TerminalManagement TerminalManagement URL KeepAlive’s frequency (in minutes) Technical reports Send technical reports automatically Report's file size Show advanced settings Very detailed Important information only Warnings and errors Choose this if you want to see everything, including the tiniest details and technical information. Best for troubleshooting. Select this to see only the key actions and events that are important for understanding what's happening. Pick this if you only want to be alerted about potential issues and serious problems that need attention. Site details Print info from ATIONET Ticket information Invoice number Ticket preview Print a ticket preview Title Subtitle Footer Bottom note Show Invoice number instead
of Authorization code Driver identification Vehicle identification Company name Merchant Primary identification Secondary identification Transaction details Company price Site CUIT Site address Site name Site code Currency GNC’s unit of measurement Fuel’s unit of measurement Allow editing product information Products Continue Cancel Password Username Next Authorization Completion Postpay Receipts Balance enquiry Reverse Recharge" Gift Card" Loyalty" Consumer Card" Active Gift Card" Refresh" Clear pending transactions Void transaction Change pin Batch close Maintenance Change supervisor’s password Create or edit products Synchronize now Send log Settings The TerminalsManagement module is not configured. Postpay Pending transactions Sending KeepAlive and synchronizing news…
 Please, wait a moment Sending logs to our servers…
 Please, wait a moment Please wait while we
 process your request… Authorization code Please, verify that TerminalsManagement is configured and that you have an internet connection.
 If you keep having issues, please contact ATIONET support. Synchronization 
done! Something went wrong! The operation was cancelled. The log has been sent! Select your pump Operations Fleet CC - GC - Task Permission denied Go back Allows the terminal to operate independently, sending requests directly to ATIONET. Coming soon Fusion IP Fusion Port Payment Type Code Are you sure you want to exit? You will be taken to the maintenance menu and all unsaved settings will be lost. No Yes Please wait while we save your new settings Previews 12/30/2024 03:30 PM 100,000.53 Native URL Vision URL Terminal identification Set default to amount instead
of quantity Fixed prompts in operations Enable Consumer Card in operations Enable Loyalty in operations Enable Gift Card in operations Set pre/sale as payments by this terminal Supports differences from what was authorized at completion Enable Local Agent When enabled, offline transactions
will be securely sent to ATIONET as
soon as you're connected to the
internet. Local Agent Port Local Agent IP The prompts selected from the list below will always be asked for when making a transaction. Secondary PIN Primary PIN Secondary identification Truck unit Miscellaneous Trailer Engine hours Odometer Attendant identification Ationet Vision Vehicle Id Quantity Amount REJECTED COMPLETED Site code - Site name MM/DD/YYYY (PREVIEW) hh:mm:ss Print transaction details in columns PROD QTY PPU Available receipts Auth. Code Vehicle Driver Present your identification
to continue You can swipe, insert, or tap your 
identification on the terminal. Scan your ID Enter manually Done! You can remove your
identification now Remove your identification to
continue the transaction Enter your identification manually Error reading the identifier It seems there was an error reading the identifier, please try again. Try again Please make sure the identifier is correctly scanned or entered. If the error persists, try again or contact technical support for assistance. Transaction to complete Auth. Code Product Authorized quantity Authorized amount Enter value Amount has to be greater than zero Quantity has to be greater than zero Amount exceeds the one authorized. Quantity exceeds the one authorized. Only %1$d digits total are permitted. Amount selected Confirm License plate could not be detected License plate detected Retry Yes, void it Print Completion summary Date Product Quantity Amount Username Required Password Required Balance"> Payment Method"> Enable payment method" New payment method" Client"> Auth. Code Quantity requested Authorized quantity Amount authorized MM/dd/yyyy hh:mm:ss a Your new settings have been saved! An error occurred while creating the product Auth. Code Quantity completed The new product has 
been created! Save Unit price Product name Product code Edit product Are you sure you want to delete You can't undo this action. Edit Delete Add new product Your changes have been saved! The product editing is disabled Date Amount completed Printing copy… Done! Remember to grab your
ticket. Print copy Okay! Review the information before continuing. Attention! You must add at least one payment method to continue. Complete credentials before continuing. Printing… Please wait a few seconds while
we print the ticket. Please wait a few seconds while we
print the client's copy. Enter supervisor password to continue Send logs The new supervisor's password has been changed! An error occurred while changing the supervisor's password Enter new supervisor's password Confirm supervisor's password Password is empty Passwords do not match Password is too short Password does not contain special character Password does not contain number Password does not contain uppercase New password cannot be the same as the previous password Local agent IP is empty Local agent port is empty IP is empty Port is empty Payment type code is empty Url is empty Invalid url Frequency is empty Try again Oops! There's an issue with the printer We detected a problem with the printer. You can try again or contact support for assistance. Error code: %1$s Error code Oops! The printer is out of paper Please replace the paper roll and try printing againg. All set! Try again Your transaction has
been completed! Oops! There are no transactions to complete We couldn't find any pending transactions associated with this identification. Okay, exit Communication error with controller Communication error Invalid format Invalid port Sale summary Void summary Oops! No skus found We couldn’t find any skus Oops! No fuels found We couldn’t find any fuels Please, try again later.
If you are positive that there are products configured for the selected pump and you are still not seeing them, please contact ATIONET support. You will be taken to the home screen. Select fuel Select SKU Fuel SKU Fueling option Option Quantity / Amount Fill Up Enter PIN Enter Empty value Enter Quantity Your transaction has
been authorized! Transaction to authorize Confirm transaction Authorization summary Enter supervisor's password Terminal id is empty There’s a pending transaction associated with this identification.
Please, complete the transaction or clear it to continue. Clear transaction Pending transaction Let's complete it! Confirm sale Confirm Accumulation Confirm Discounts You can create a new product in the Maintenance menu.
If the product doesn't appear in this view after creating it, please contact ATIONET support for assistance. Missing Information in QR Code The scanned QR code does not contain all the necessary information. Please ensure the QR code is valid and try again. If the issue persists, verify that the QR code is properly formatted or contact technical support for further assistance. Select the currency Select the fuel's unit of measurement Select the GNC's unit of measurement No pending transactions Clear it! Clear summary Your transaction has
been cleared! hh:mm:ss a Terminal ID: %1$s Invoice number: Authorization code: TSN: %1$s Client: %s" Empty Payment Method Payment method: %s"> Payment method:"> Amount: %s Balance: %s Recharge completed successfully"> Reverse completed successfully"> Balance Enquiry completed successfully"> Accumulation completed successfully"> Discounts completed successfully"> Points Redemption completed successfully"> Rewards Redemption completed successfully"> Client: Client ID: Pan: Vehicle code: Vehicle plate: Company name: Primary track: Secondary track: Product: %1$s Discounts and rebates: -%1$s Surcharges: %1$s Signature Commerce ticket Client copy Authorization Looks like we need more information to process the transaction… Password is invalid Processing image… Please take a picture of the vehicle where the license plate is visible This transaction has already been processed and cannot be voided. Invalid transaction type. Only sales or completions can be voided. Transaction not found. Enter the Authorization Code
to void Transaction Type Your transaction has
been voided! Void Transaction Transaction to void Completion Postpay No receipts found It looks like there are no receipts to display right now. Receipts are created for both sales and completions. If you’ve completed either of these operations but still don’t see any receipts, please contact ATIONET support. Today Yesterday Controller communication failure Communication failure Your sale has been
completed! PIN Enter at least 4 characters Invalid password Product not found ID verification in progress… Identification inserted Fetching identification data.
Please, wait a few seconds. hh:mm a Loading… Pending Changes Error loading receipts Amount requested The selected controller is not available. Please choose another option to proceed. Unit price must be greater than 0 Unit price can't be empty The number cannot have more than 10 digits The number cannot have more than 3 decimals Available Amount: %1$s Quantity: %1$s Balance summary Do you want to
do a batch close? Batch ID Sales count Sales amount Recharge CC count Recharge CC amount Reverse CC count Reverse CC amount Cancelled sales Cancelled amount Batch close summary Batch closed! Batch Close Sales Total sale Cancelled Total cancelled You have pending authorizations Pending authorizations If you continue, they will be completed with zero amount. Do you wish to proceed? Pin is empty Pins must match Pin is too short Pin is too long Pin must cointain only numbers Pin same as previous Enter your current PIN Enter your new PIN Confirm your new PIN Your PIN has been changed! Something went wrong!
The operation was cancelled. PIN change summary Error message Change PIN PIN changed successfully Active GC successfully , . Site Code Name Address CUIT Log Enabled Url KeepAlive Terminal Serial Number Version Terminal ID Quantity selected PAN TEST COMPANY TEST PLATE TEST DRIVER NAME TEST DRIVER ID TEST VEHICLE CODE TEST TOTAL: %1$s Do you want to save the settings before printing? If you do not save, the previously saved configuration will be printed Error Code Error Message Premium Diesel Amount completed Quantity completed The frequency must not be less than 15 minutes There are fields that require correction All the changes received via the last synchronization couldn't be applied. Report detail levels 21 We couldn’t find any pumps configured Please, try again later.
If you are positive that there are pumps configured and you are still not seeing them, please contact ATIONET support. No pumps configured Please wait while we obtain the forecourt configuration… Dispenser unavailable A new update has been received via TerminalsManagement.
Please, wait a few seconds… A communication error occurred while attempting to connect with the controller. If the problem persists, please contact ATIONET support. Pump Pump is busy Sales of pump Nº%1$s Paid sale Sale not available No receipts found for pump Nº%1$s Receipts for pump Nº%1$s Select a pump to
view the receipts Operation Pump: %1$s Transaction to sale No pending transactions found It looks like there are no pending transactions to display right now. If you’ve performed transactions that couldn’t be completed but still can’t see it, please contact ATIONET support. No sales found It looks like there are no dispatches to display right now. If you’ve made a sale but still can’t see it, please contact ATIONET support. Pending Pre-Authorization
Auth. code Quantity dispatched Amount dispatched Pending transaction to complete Transaction not found It looks like the transaction your're
looking for is not available right now. If you've initiated a transaction that
couldn't be completed but still can't
see it, please visit the ATIONET
 portal to finalize it. Error loading transactions Product code cannot be empty This product code already exists. It has to be unique Product code is invalid Product name cannot be empty This product name already exists. It has to be unique Unit price can't have more than 4 numbers Operation completed successfully Invalid Network Code Occurred Error
/*Loyalty*/ Loyalty Accumulation Discounts Balance Enquiry Points Redemption Rewards Redemption Batch Close Void Accumulation Points Balance License Plate Customer PAN Program Program Unit Community Community Unit Customer Name Balance: %1$s Customer PAN: %1$s Points: %1$s Community: %1$s Program Unit: %1$s Customer Name: %1$s License Plate: %1$s Accumulation count Accumulation amount Void Accumulation count void Accumulation amount Points Redemption count Points Redemption amount Rewards Redemption count Rewards Redemption amount Accumulation Total Accumulation amount Void Accumulation count Total void Accumulation Points Redemption Total Points Redemption Rewards Redemption Total Rewards Redemption Points Discounts
